name: Travellin Cats in Georgia
short_description: Find 100 cats hidden across Georgia in this cute hand-drawn hidden object game by Travellin Cats - the original viral hidden cat game creator! Can you find them all?
detailed_description:
PSA

If this is your first Travellin Cats game, I recommend starting with another one first since this one has an incredibly large map, which makes the experience extremely difficult and potentially frustrating.


About the Game

Travellin Cats in Georgia (formerly Cats Hidden in Georgia) is a very difficult but cute hidden object game set in the highly underrated country of Georgia.

100 cats are waiting for you to be discovered within a hand-drawn background.

Relax, thanks to the chill soundtrack

Found a cat? Click on it!

Features

🐾 1 Level, 100 cats

❔ Easter Eggs

💡 Hint System

⏰ Timer mode with leaderboard

⚙️ In-game Settings
